negative_events.name: War
negative_events.description: Armed conflict depletes resources, diverts budget, and disrupts supply chains
narratives: Enemy forces have crossed the border. Defense requests emergency funding for military operations. Agricultural and commerce sectors report supply chain disruptions.
A border conflict has escalated into open warfare. Military operations require immediate funding. Trade routes disrupted, agricultural exports halted.
Armed insurgents have seized territory along the eastern border. Defense ministry mobilizing reserves. Economic activity disrupted in border regions.

negative_events.name: Famine
negative_events.description: Crop failure and food shortage strain health services and reduce workforce productivity
narratives: Harvest projections indicate a 40% shortfall. Agricultural imports required. Health services report increased malnutrition cases. Workforce productivity declining.
Severe drought has devastated crop yields across multiple provinces. Food prices soaring. Health ministry reports rising malnutrition among vulnerable populations.
Unseasonable frost has destroyed winter crops. Grain reserves at critical levels. Emergency food distribution programs needed. Commerce sector reports supply shortages.

negative_events.name: Virus Outbreak
negative_events.description: Epidemic demands emergency health spending and reduces labor availability
narratives: A viral outbreak has spread across multiple provinces. Health ministry requests emergency medical supplies. Economic output declining as workforce falls ill. Food distribution affected.
New infectious disease detected in three major cities. Hospitals overwhelmed. Commerce activity slowing as workers quarantine. Agricultural labor shortages reported.
Pandemic conditions declared. Health infrastructure strained beyond capacity. International trade restricted. Agricultural harvesting crews depleted by illness.

negative_events.name: Unemployment Crisis
negative_events.description: Rising unemployment strains social services, reduces commerce tax revenue, and pressures education funding
narratives: Unemployment rates have spiked. Social services report increased benefit claims. Commerce ministry reports declining tax revenue. Education budgets under pressure as workforce development programs expand.
Mass layoffs across manufacturing sector. Social welfare programs overwhelmed with applications. Consumer spending declining sharply. Vocational retraining programs urgently needed.
Unemployment reaches decade-high levels. Homelessness increasing in urban areas. Small businesses closing at alarming rate. Education ministry proposes emergency skills programs.

negative_events.name: Teacher Shortage
negative_events.description: Critical shortage of qualified teachers disrupts education delivery and strains social services
narratives: Schools report acute teacher shortages. Education ministry requests emergency hiring budget. Social services note increased youth counseling demand. Teacher training programs need investment.
Nationwide teacher exodus as salaries fail to keep pace with inflation. Rural schools hardest hit. Youth delinquency rising in underserved areas.
University education departments report declining enrollment. Teaching profession losing talent to private sector. Emergency staffing measures required across all grade levels.

negative_events.name: Market Crash
negative_events.description: Financial markets collapse, reducing commerce revenue and straining all government functions
narratives: Stock markets have crashed. Commerce ministry reports severe revenue shortfall. All departments report reduced tax collections. Emergency measures required to maintain basic services.
Financial sector in freefall. Banking system under severe stress. Government revenue projections slashed across all departments. Austerity measures being considered.
Currency crisis deepening. International investors fleeing. Import costs skyrocketing across all sectors. Emergency fiscal stabilization required.

negative_events.name: Contamination
negative_events.description: Environmental contamination affects food supply and public health
narratives: Water supply contamination detected. Agricultural land affected. Health services report increased illness cases. Social services preparing for community relocation if spread continues.
Industrial chemical spill has contaminated major river system. Farmland downstream rendered unusable. Emergency medical screening underway. Affected communities need relocation assistance.
Heavy metal contamination found in soil across farming district. Crops recalled from markets. Hospital admissions rising with poisoning symptoms. Municipal water treatment facilities overwhelmed.

negative_events.name: Infrastructure Collapse
negative_events.description: Critical infrastructure failure disrupts transport, communication, and economic activity
narratives: A critical bridge has collapsed. Social services report transport disruptions. Commerce activity slowed. Defense logistics affected as supply routes are compromised.
Power grid failure across northern provinces. Municipal services crippled. Businesses unable to operate. Military communications infrastructure damaged.
Major highway network deteriorated beyond safe use. Emergency repairs required on hundreds of bridges and roads. Supply chains disrupted nationwide. Defense mobility compromised.

negative_events.name: Public Distrust
negative_events.description: Erosion of public confidence in government strains social cohesion and reduces compliance
narratives: Public trust in government institutions has declined significantly. Social services report increased resistance to public programs. All departments note reduced voluntary compliance. Recovery requires sustained transparency.
Corruption scandal has eroded public confidence. Citizens protesting government spending. Tax compliance dropping. Social unrest in major cities.
Media exposé reveals government inefficiency. Public approval ratings at historic low. Civic participation declining. All ministries facing increased scrutiny and reduced cooperation.

positive_events.name: Trade Agreement
positive_events.description: Favorable trade terms increase commerce revenue and economic activity
narratives: New trade agreement signed. Export revenues projected to increase. Commerce ministry reports favorable terms. Treasury expected to receive tariff payments.
Bilateral trade deal ratified. Import tariffs reduced on key goods. Export market access expanded. Treasury to benefit from increased trade volume.
Regional free trade zone established. Commerce sector projects significant growth. Foreign direct investment increasing. Customs revenue rising.

positive_events.name: Technological Innovation
positive_events.description: R&D breakthrough improves productivity across sectors
narratives: Researchers have developed new efficiency technology. Education sector reports productivity gains. Long-term economic benefits projected. Patents and licensing expected to generate treasury revenue.
Major scientific breakthrough at national research institute. Technology licensing deals being negotiated. Education costs reduced through digital innovation.
Domestically developed technology gaining international attention. Licensing revenue flowing in. Education sector efficiency improved through new learning platforms.

positive_events.name: Agricultural Bounty
positive_events.description: Favorable weather and yields increase agricultural output and exports
narratives: Harvest projections exceed expectations. Agricultural sector reports record yields. Food exports projected to increase. Treasury to receive export tariffs.
Perfect growing season produces bumper crop. Grain reserves overflowing. Export opportunities emerging in international markets. Farm income at all-time high.
New crop varieties delivering exceptional yields. Agricultural surplus enables food exports for first time. Rural economy thriving.

positive_events.name: Public Health Campaign
positive_events.description: Successful health initiatives reduce disease burden and future costs
narratives: Public health campaign shows remarkable results. Disease incidence declining. Healthcare costs projected to decrease. Treasury saves on future health emergency response.
Vaccination program reaches record coverage. Hospital admissions dropping. Preventive care reducing long-term healthcare burden. Health ministry operating more efficiently.
National fitness initiative improving population health outcomes. Chronic disease rates falling. Workplace productivity increasing as sick days decline.

positive_events.name: Infrastructure Upgrade
positive_events.description: New infrastructure reduces maintenance costs and improves services
narratives: New infrastructure project completed ahead of schedule. Social services report improved efficiency. Maintenance costs declining. Treasury to receive infrastructure service fees.
Smart city initiative delivering results. Municipal services automated and more efficient. Energy costs reduced. Public satisfaction with services increasing.
Transport network modernization complete. Commute times reduced. Economic productivity boosted by improved connectivity. Operating costs significantly lower.

positive_events.name: Diplomatic Victory
positive_events.description: Successful diplomacy reduces defense spending requirements and may bring foreign aid
narratives: Diplomatic negotiations successful. Regional tensions declining. Defense spending requirements reduced. Allied nations providing economic assistance. Treasury to receive foreign aid payments.
Peace accord signed with neighboring state. Military demobilization underway. Defense budget requirements reduced. International community pledging reconstruction aid.
Successful mediation prevents armed conflict. Defense readiness can be reduced. Foreign governments offering trade concessions and financial support.

positive_events.name: High Public Enthusiasm
positive_events.description: Nationwide optimism boosts productivity and tax compliance
narratives: Citizen morale is at a record high. All sectors report improved productivity. Tax compliance increasing across all departments. Treasury expects higher than projected revenue.
National celebration following major achievement has galvanized public spirit. Volunteerism surging. Economic activity increasing. Government approval at all-time high.
Wave of optimism sweeps the nation. Consumer confidence soaring. Civic engagement at record levels. All departments benefit from improved public cooperation.

black_swan_events.name: Natural Disaster
black_swan_events.description: Major natural catastrophe disrupts normal government operations across all sectors
narratives: A major earthquake has struck. One sector crippled with severe damage. Emergency response required across all departments. Recovery will require significant resource reallocation.
Category 5 hurricane has devastated coastal regions. Infrastructure destroyed. Mass evacuation underway. All government resources being redirected to disaster response.
Unprecedented flooding has submerged major population centers. Rescue operations ongoing. Agricultural lands destroyed. Economic activity at standstill.

black_swan_events.name: Compound Crisis
black_swan_events.description: Multiple crises strike simultaneously, overwhelming government capacity across all sectors
narratives: Multiple crises have struck at once. All departments report critical demands. Government capacity severely strained. Emergency measures across all sectors required to prevent collapse.
Simultaneous economic collapse and natural disaster. All sectors overwhelmed. Emergency reserves depleted. International aid being requested.
Cascading failures across financial, health, and infrastructure systems. Every ministry reports crisis-level demands. National emergency declared.
